title: A decade of digital scholarship at Leiden University Libraries
content: Head of the Leiden University Libraries' (UBL) Centre for Digital Scholarship, Alenka Prinčič, writes about the past and future of digital scholarship at the UBL.
snippet: Head of the Leiden University Libraries' (UBL) Centre for Digital Scholarship, Alenka Prinčič, writes about the past and future of digital scholarship at the UBL.
